description: Reference spec for stress-test Excel workbooks
openpyxl_merge_limitations: Merge columns / merge-across: many horizontal 1-row merges stress iteration
Empty master: value in right cell then merge left — content lost (MergedCell has no value)
Table + merged header: Excel tables with merged header cells — openpyxl/Excel may behave oddly
Single-cell merge A1:A1: invalid; openpyxl allows it; bounds min==max
Borders/style loss on merged cells when load/save

expected_features.cells: Non-empty cells extracted with values and formulas
expected_features.merged_cells: Merge regions resolved, value in top-left
expected_features.charts: Chart type, series, anchors extracted from OOXML
expected_features.named_ranges: Defined names with ref_string and scope
expected_features.comments: Cell comments with author and text

validation_checks: workbook.errors has no ERROR severity unless load failed
chunks produced for each block and chart
